title: Fear and Trembling
author: Søren Kierkegaard
content: “To have faith is to lose your mind and to win God.”

title: The Prince of Foxes
author: Samuel Shellabarger
content: “He who waits for time to work for him, works for time.”

title: Candide
author: Voltaire
action: Ignore the noise; focus on your immediate domain.

title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra
author: Friedrich Nietzsche
content: “You must have chaos within you to give birth to a dancing star.”
action: Utilize your tension to create something new.

title: The Histories
author: Herodotus
content: “Of all men, they are most truly wise who have the best power of judgment.”
action: Trust your internal assessment over consensus.
